statusLine.command: input=$(cat); user=$(whoami); host=$(hostname -s); dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // empty'); ctx_used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); ctx_rem=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); in_tok=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.current_usage.input_tokens // empty'); out_tok=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.current_usage.output_tokens // empty'); tot_in=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_input_tokens // 0'); tot_out=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_output_tokens // 0'); model_id=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.id // empty'); if [[ "$model_id" == *"haiku"* ]]; then cost=$(echo "scale=3; (($tot_in * 0.8) + ($tot_out * 4)) / 1000000" | bc 2>/dev/null || echo "0"); else cost=$(echo "scale=3; (($tot_in * 3) + ($tot_out * 15)) / 1000000" | bc 2>/dev/null || echo "0"); fi; git_br=$(cd "$dir" 2>/dev/null && GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git describe --tags --exact-match 2>/dev/null || GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); git_dirt=$(cd "$dir" 2>/dev/null && GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git diff --quiet 2>/dev/null; if [ $? -eq 1 ]; then echo '±'; fi); out="$(printf '\033[96m')$user@$host$(printf '\033[0m') $(printf '\033[94m')$dir$(printf '\033[0m')"; [ -n "$git_br" ] && out="$out $(printf '\033[92m')⎇ $git_br$(printf '\033[0m')$(printf '\033[93m')$git_dirt$(printf '\033[0m')"; [ -n "$model" ] && out="$out $(printf '\033[90m')[$model]$(printf '\033[0m')"; [ -n "$in_tok" ] && [ "$in_tok" != "null" ] && out="$out $(printf '\033[90m')[in:$in_tok|out:$out_tok]$(printf '\033[0m')"; [ -n "$ctx_used" ] && [ "$ctx_used" != "null" ] && out="$out $(printf '\033[90m')[${ctx_used}%]$(printf '\033[0m')" || ([ -n "$ctx_rem" ] && [ "$ctx_rem" != "null" ] && out="$out $(printf '\033[90m')[${ctx_rem}%↑]$(printf '\033[0m')"); [ "$cost" != "0" ] && out="$out $(printf '\033[90m')[$${cost}]$(printf '\033[0m')"; echo "$out"
